project.name: Module 9: Background Service Worker
project.description: Create entrypoints/background.ts — MV3 service worker orchestrating context menus, keyboard shortcuts, typed message passing, auto-lock timer, Sentry error tracking, and incognito state detection. Also create lib/background-types.ts (TYPES ONLY — zero runtime code) defining the COMPLETE typed message protocol (16 message types) shared between background, popup, and manager. First entrypoint module — crosses lib/ → entrypoints/ boundary. Uses WXT defineBackground(). Core handlers (6) implemented here; remaining handlers stubbed with exhaustive switch for Modules 10-12 to wire up. Target: ≤300 lines (background.ts) + ≤150 lines (background-types.ts).
project.parent_plan: Hush Consolidated Build Plan — Day 4 (first module)

preserve_verbatim: Context menu 'Add to [extension]' right-click item that captures page URL and title (Holy PB background.js, 78 lines)
Message passing via chrome.runtime.onMessage between popup and background

falls_short.deficiency: Holy PB background.js has untyped messages — ad-hoc objects with no discrimination
falls_short.hush_requires: Typed discriminated union: BackgroundMessage with type field. 16 message types covering ALL operations across Modules 9-13. Each type has typed payload and response.

falls_short.deficiency: No auto-lock timer — bookmarks stay accessible until manual lock
falls_short.hush_requires: chrome.alarms-based auto-lock. Default 10 minutes. Resets on activity. MV3-safe (survives SW termination).
Sentry scoped BrowserClient already initialized in background.ts stub (line 3). Wire captureException to error paths.
Detect incognito state on startup + per-message sender. Pass to lib/incognito.ts determineMode().
chrome.commands for Ctrl+Shift+H to open popup. _execute_action opens popup when popup is set (does NOT toggle — MV3 behavior).

do_not_incorporate: setTimeout for auto-lock (use chrome.alarms for MV3)
build_from_scratch: lib/background-types.ts: Complete 16-type BackgroundMessage discriminated union, BackgroundResponse, SessionState. TYPES ONLY — zero runtime code, zero imports beyond type imports. Must pass lib/ purity check.
Core message types (Module 9 implements): UNLOCK, LOCK, SAVE, GET_STATE, ADD_BOOKMARK, GET_INCOGNITO_STATE
Settings message types (Module 12 wires up): CHANGE_PASSWORD, UPDATE_AUTO_LOCK, CREATE_SET, RENAME_SET, DELETE_SET, SWITCH_SET, CLEAR_ALL
Import/Export message types (Module 12 wires up): IMPORT_CHROME_BOOKMARKS, IMPORT_BACKUP, EXPORT_BACKUP
handleMessage dispatcher with exhaustive switch — core handlers implemented, stubs return NOT_IMPLEMENTED

Session state: tree persisted via chrome.storage.session (survives SW termination, cleared on browser close). Password stays in SW memory only (cleared on LOCK, lost on termination — correct security behavior).
Context menu registration with duplicate prevention

user_stories.title: Complete message protocol types and handler scaffold
user_stories.description: Define the COMPLETE typed message protocol (all 16 types) in lib/background-types.ts (TYPES ONLY — no runtime code). Create entrypoints/background.ts with WXT defineBackground() and message listener dispatching to typed handlers. Core handlers are stubs initially; non-core handlers return NOT_IMPLEMENTED. The exhaustive switch ensures TypeScript catches any unhandled message type at compile time.
steps: PREREQUISITE: Modify wxt.config.ts — (a) Add 'alarms' to permissions (contextMenus and activeTab ALREADY EXIST from Module 1 — do NOT re-add). (b) Add manifest.incognito: 'spanning' (deferred from Module 8 — required for incognito detection). (c) Add chrome.commands config: { '_execute_action': { 'suggested_key': { 'default': 'Ctrl+Shift+H' }, 'description': 'Open Hush popup' } }. Research WXT manifest.commands syntax first. NOTE: _execute_action opens the popup when a popup is set (it does NOT toggle — MV3 behavior).
RED: Test: 'BackgroundMessage union covers all 16 message types'
RED: Test: 'handleMessage returns error for unknown message type'
RED: Test: 'UNLOCK message requires password field'
RED: Test: 'GET_STATE returns session state shape'
RED: Test: 'non-core message types return NOT_IMPLEMENTED response'

GREEN: Create lib/background-types.ts with all 16 message types as discriminated union. TYPES ONLY: only type and import type statements — zero runtime code, zero non-type imports. This file lives in lib/ and must pass the purity check. Define BackgroundResponse. Define SessionState. Create entrypoints/background.ts with defineBackground(), chrome.runtime.onMessage listener, handleMessage with exhaustive switch (never type check). Core types get stub handlers; non-core return { success: false, error: 'NOT_IMPLEMENTED', code: message.type }.
REFACTOR: Verify exhaustive switch with never type check. Verify background-types.ts contains zero runtime code.
acceptance_criteria: lib/background-types.ts exports: BackgroundMessage (16-type union), BackgroundResponse, SessionState, MessageType literal union, all individual message interfaces
lib/background-types.ts is TYPES ONLY: zero runtime code. Only type and import type statements. Passes lib/ purity check.

Core (6): UNLOCK { type, password, setId? }, LOCK { type }, SAVE { type, tree: BookmarkTree }, GET_STATE { type }, ADD_BOOKMARK { type, url, title, parentPath?: readonly number[] }, GET_INCOGNITO_STATE { type }

Settings (7): CHANGE_PASSWORD { type, currentPassword, newPassword }, UPDATE_AUTO_LOCK { type, minutes }, CREATE_SET { type, name, password }, RENAME_SET { type, setId, newName }, DELETE_SET { type, setId }, SWITCH_SET { type, setId, password }, CLEAR_ALL { type, confirmation: 'DELETE' }
Import/Export (3): IMPORT_CHROME_BOOKMARKS { type }, IMPORT_BACKUP { type, blob, password }, EXPORT_BACKUP { type }
BackgroundResponse: { success: true; data?: unknown } | { success: false; error: string; code?: string }
SessionState: { isUnlocked: boolean; activeSetId: string; sets: PasswordSetInfo[]; tree: BookmarkTree | null; incognitoMode: IncognitoMode }
handleMessage exhaustive switch with never check
Non-core handlers return { success: false, error: 'NOT_IMPLEMENTED', code: '<type>' }
wxt.config.ts gains: alarms permission, incognito: 'spanning', commands config with 'Open Hush popup'
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/entrypoints/background.test.ts tests/unit/lib/background-types.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit && npx wxt build

user_stories.title: Unlock/Lock handlers with chrome.storage.session and auto-lock alarm
user_stories.description: UNLOCK: decrypt active set, persist tree to chrome.storage.session, cache password in SW memory only, start auto-lock alarm. LOCK: clear session + password, clear alarm. GET_STATE: read from chrome.storage.session (resilient to SW restart).
steps: RED: Test: 'UNLOCK decrypts active set and returns SessionState'
RED: Test: 'UNLOCK persists tree to chrome.storage.session'
RED: Test: 'UNLOCK caches password in memory only (not in storage.session)'
RED: Test: 'UNLOCK starts auto-lock alarm'
RED: Test: 'UNLOCK with wrong password returns INVALID_PASSWORD code'
RED: Test: 'LOCK clears chrome.storage.session and in-memory password'
RED: Test: 'LOCK clears auto-lock alarm'
RED: Test: 'auto-lock alarm fires LOCK'
RED: Test: 'GET_STATE reads from chrome.storage.session'

GREEN: Two-tier session state: (1) chrome.storage.session for tree, isUnlocked, activeSetId, sets, incognitoMode — survives SW restarts. (2) SW in-memory variable for password — cleared on LOCK, lost on termination. UNLOCK: loadManifest → getActiveSetId → loadSetData → JSON.parse → chrome.storage.session.set → cache password → alarm → SessionState. LOCK: chrome.storage.session.clear + null password → clear alarm. GET_STATE: chrome.storage.session.get. SW termination → password lost → GET_STATE returns locked.
acceptance_criteria: Tree in chrome.storage.session (survives SW restart)
Password in SW memory ONLY (never in any storage)
UNLOCK: loadSetData → JSON.parse → chrome.storage.session.set → cache pw → alarm → SessionState
UNLOCK wrong password: { success: false, error: 'Invalid password', code: 'INVALID_PASSWORD' }
LOCK: chrome.storage.session.clear() + null pw → clear alarm
Auto-lock: chrome.alarms.create(AUTO_LOCK_ALARM, { delayInMinutes })
chrome.alarms.onAlarm triggers LOCK
GET_STATE reads from chrome.storage.session
SW termination → locked state (password lost = correct)
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/entrypoints/background.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit

user_stories.title: SAVE and ADD_BOOKMARK handlers with alarm reset
user_stories.description: SAVE: JSON.stringify tree, encrypt, persist. ADD_BOOKMARK: addBookmark(tree, parentPath, bookmark) then save. Both reset alarm. Both require cached password.
steps: RED: Test: 'SAVE serializes tree with JSON.stringify before saveSetData'
RED: Test: 'SAVE resets auto-lock alarm on success'
RED: Test: 'SAVE with no cached password returns error'
RED: Test: 'ADD_BOOKMARK adds to tree and saves'
RED: Test: 'ADD_BOOKMARK resets auto-lock alarm'

GREEN: SAVE: validate cached password → JSON.stringify(message.tree) → saveSetData(activeSetId, json, password) → chrome.storage.session.set updated tree → resetAlarm(). ADD_BOOKMARK: validate session → addBookmark(cachedTree, message.parentPath ?? [], { type: 'bookmark', title, url, dateAdded: Date.now() }) → JSON.stringify → saveSetData → chrome.storage.session.set → resetAlarm() → return updated tree. CRITICAL: saveSetData/loadSetData work with strings. Always JSON.stringify before save, JSON.parse after load.
REFACTOR: Extract resetAlarm(), serializeTree(), deserializeTree() helpers
acceptance_criteria: SAVE: JSON.stringify(tree) → saveSetData → update chrome.storage.session → reset alarm
ADD_BOOKMARK: addBookmark(tree, parentPath ?? [], bookmark) → save → update session → reset alarm → return tree
JSON.stringify before saveSetData, JSON.parse after loadSetData — explicit everywhere
Both error when no cached password
Alarm reset on every successful mutation

user_stories.title: Context menu, incognito detection, and Sentry error wiring
user_stories.description: Context menu on SW startup. Incognito detection. Verify existing Sentry init (already in stub) and wire captureException to error paths.
steps: RED: Test: 'context menu registered on startup'
RED: Test: 'context menu click triggers ADD_BOOKMARK with parentPath: []'
RED: Test: 'GET_INCOGNITO_STATE returns resolved mode'
RED: Test: 'handleMessage error paths call captureException'

GREEN: Context menu in main() with removeAll() first. onClicked → ADD_BOOKMARK with parentPath: []. GET_INCOGNITO_STATE: resolve isAllowedIncognitoAccess → determineMode(). SENTRY: Verify existing initSentry() at line 3 of stub — do NOT recreate. Wire captureException to handleMessage catch and handler error paths.
REFACTOR: Context menu re-registers on every SW startup
acceptance_criteria: Context menu: 'Add to Hush', contexts: ['page', 'link']
removeAll() before create
Context menu → ADD_BOOKMARK with parentPath: []
GET_INCOGNITO_STATE resolves via determineMode()
Existing initSentry() verified, NOT recreated
captureException wired to error paths

what_exists.lib_modules: 12 files in lib/: types.ts, errors.ts, sentry.ts, utils.ts, crypto.ts, storage.ts (263 lines), data-model.ts (299 lines), bookmark-import.ts (191 lines), bookmark-backup.ts (~130 lines), password-sets.ts (238 lines), recovery.ts (66 lines), incognito.ts (58 lines). scaffold-smoke tracks 12 LIB_MODULES.
what_exists.types: lib/types.ts: Bookmark, Folder, BookmarkNode, BookmarkTree = Folder, EncryptedStore, Result<T,E>, PasswordSetInfo, PasswordSetManifest, RecoveryMetadata
what_exists.errors: lib/errors.ts: StorageError (reason?), InvalidPasswordError, DecryptionError, DataModelError (kind), ImportError (source?, format?), RecoveryError (RecoveryErrorContext)

key_exports.password_sets: loadManifest, createSet, deleteSet, renameSet, listSets, setStorageKey, validateManifest, saveSetData, loadSetData, hasSetData, getActiveSetId, setActiveSetId, MANIFEST_KEY, MANIFEST_VERSION
key_exports.recovery: generateMnemonic, validateMnemonic, deriveRecoveryPassword, createRecoveryBlob, recoverFromBlob, recoveryStorageKey, RECOVERY_KEY_PREFIX
key_exports.incognito: determineMode, shouldAutoUnlock, getIncognitoMessage, INCOGNITO_MESSAGES, IncognitoState, IncognitoMode, IncognitoConfig
key_exports.data_model: addBookmark(tree: BookmarkTree, parentPath: readonly number[], bookmark: Omit<Bookmark, 'id'>): Result<BookmarkTree, DataModelError>
key_exports.storage: saveEncryptedData, loadEncryptedData, hasData, clearAll, getStorageUsage, validateEncryptedStore, STORAGE_KEY, DEFAULT_STORAGE_QUOTA, RETRY_CONFIG
key_exports.crypto: encrypt, decrypt, deriveKey, generateSalt, verifyPassword, CRYPTO_CONFIG

what_exists.test_counts: 586 unit tests (30 files), 97 E2E tests. Build: 594.45 kB. happy-dom environment.
what_exists.sentry: DSN obtained. @sentry/browser installed. lib/sentry.ts exists. background.ts stub ALREADY calls initSentry() at line 3.
what_exists.wxt_config: wxt.config.ts has: permissions [storage, contextMenus, activeTab, bookmarks], optional_permissions [history]. Does NOT have: alarms permission, incognito: 'spanning', commands config.
what_exists.entrypoints: entrypoints/background.ts: minimal stub with defineBackground(), initSentry() at line 3, empty onInstalled handler.
what_exists.serialization_note: saveSetData takes string, loadSetData returns string. JSON.stringify before save, JSON.parse after load.

what_does_not_exist.background: No message handling, context menus, auto-lock, shortcuts.
what_does_not_exist.manifest_additions: alarms, incognito: 'spanning', commands — all missing from wxt.config.ts.

tech_stack.sentry: Already initialized in stub. Verify and wire captureException.
tech_stack.chrome_storage_session: Persists across SW restarts, cleared on browser close. Tree + metadata here. Password NEVER here.
tech_stack.testing: Vitest + happy-dom. Mock chrome.runtime.onMessage, contextMenus, alarms, extension.isAllowedIncognitoAccess, storage.session.

message_protocol.architecture: HYBRID: GET_STATE on mount + message-per-mutation. Wait-for-response (NOT optimistic). ~5-20ms latency.
message_protocol.complete_protocol: All 16 types in Module 9. Core (6) implemented. Settings/Import (10) stubbed → Module 12 wires up.
message_protocol.add_bookmark_signature: ADD_BOOKMARK carries parentPath?: readonly number[] (NOT folderId). Matches addBookmark(tree, parentPath, bookmark). Default [] = root.

session_architecture.two_tier: chrome.storage.session = tree + metadata. SW memory = password.
session_architecture.sw_termination: Tree survives. Password lost. GET_STATE → locked. User re-enters. Correct.

inputs.what_it_provides: All set CRUD. saveSetData/loadSetData work with strings.

known_risks.action: Tree in chrome.storage.session. Password lost = user re-enters. Correct.
Check WXT test utils. Manual mocks if needed.
Chrome 102+, Edge 102+ (we target 120+). Firefox limited — research WXT polyfill.
10 stubs are one-liners. If over, extract to background-handlers.ts.

metadata.session_protocol: One Claude Code session. Research WXT defineBackground() + chrome.alarms + chrome.storage.session. Verify initSentry() in stub. Commit per story.
metadata.quality_gate: All tests pass. tsc clean. wxt build. 16 types exhaustive. ≤300 + ≤150 lines. background-types.ts zero runtime code. incognito: 'spanning' in manifest. Password never in storage.
metadata.human_review_required: Verify: incognito: 'spanning', Sentry not re-initialized, password never in storage, ADD_BOOKMARK uses parentPath, JSON.stringify/parse around saveSetData/loadSetData.

execution_rules.clarifying_questions: Encouraged. Key: chrome.storage.session Firefox support, initSentry() integration, JSON serialization.
